scripts.install-frontend: cd frontend && npm install --verbose && ls -la node_modules/.bin | grep vite
scripts.install-all: npm run install-backend && npm run install-frontend
scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build-frontend
scripts.start: npm run build-frontend && npm start --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
